001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.bean.swagger;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.marshall.internal.ConverterUtils.*;
023
024import java.util.*;
025
026import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
028
029/**
030 * Allows the definition of input and output data types.
031 *
032 * <p>
033 * The Schema Object allows the definition of input and output data types for Swagger 2.0, including objects,
034 * primitives, and arrays. This object is an extended subset of the JSON Schema Specification Draft 4, with
035 * additional extensions provided by the Swagger Specification to allow for more complete documentation.
036 *
037 * <h5 class='section'>Swagger Specification:</h5>
038 * <p>
039 * The Schema Object supports all properties from JSON Schema Draft 4, including but not limited to:
040 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
041 *    <li><c>type</c> (string) - The data type. Values: <js>"string"</js>, <js>"number"</js>, <js>"integer"</js>, <js>"boolean"</js>, <js>"array"</js>, <js>"object"</js>, <js>"file"</js>
042 *    <li><c>format</c> (string) - The format modifier (e.g., <js>"int32"</js>, <js>"int64"</js>, <js>"float"</js>, <js>"double"</js>, <js>"date"</js>, <js>"date-time"</js>)
043 *    <li><c>title</c> (string) - A short title for the schema
044 *    <li><c>description</c> (string) - A description of the schema
045 *    <li><c>default</c> (any) - The default value
046 *    <li><c>multipleOf</c> (number) - Must be a multiple of this value
047 *    <li><c>maximum</c> (number) - Maximum value (inclusive by default)
048 *    <li><c>exclusiveMaximum</c> (boolean) - If true, maximum is exclusive
049 *    <li><c>minimum</c> (number) - Minimum value (inclusive by default)
050 *    <li><c>exclusiveMinimum</c> (boolean) - If true, minimum is exclusive
051 *    <li><c>maxLength</c> (integer) - Maximum string length
052 *    <li><c>minLength</c> (integer) - Minimum string length
053 *    <li><c>pattern</c> (string) - Regular expression pattern the string must match
054 *    <li><c>maxItems</c> (integer) - Maximum array length
055 *    <li><c>minItems</c> (integer) - Minimum array length
056 *    <li><c>uniqueItems</c> (boolean) - If true, array items must be unique
057 *    <li><c>maxProperties</c> (integer) - Maximum number of object properties
058 *    <li><c>minProperties</c> (integer) - Minimum number of object properties
059 *    <li><c>required</c> (array of string) - Required property names
060 *    <li><c>enum</c> (array) - Possible values for this schema
061 *    <li><c>properties</c> (map of {@link SchemaInfo}) - Object property definitions
062 *    <li><c>items</c> ({@link Items}) - Schema for array items
063 *    <li><c>allOf</c> (array of {@link SchemaInfo}) - Must validate against all schemas
064 *    <li><c>discriminator</c> (string) - Property name for polymorphism (Swagger extension)
065 *    <li><c>readOnly</c> (boolean) - Relevant only for Schema properties (Swagger extension)
066 *    <li><c>xml</c> ({@link Xml}) - XML representation details (Swagger extension)
067 *    <li><c>externalDocs</c> ({@link ExternalDocumentation}) - Additional external documentation (Swagger extension)
068 *    <li><c>example</c> (any) - Example value (Swagger extension)
069 * </ul>
070 *
071 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
072 * <p class='bjava'>
073 *    <jc>// Construct using SwaggerBuilder.</jc>
074 *    SchemaInfo <jv>info</jv> = <jsm>schemaInfo</jsm>()
075 *       .type(<js>"string"</js>)
076 *       .title(<js>"foo"</js>)
077 *
078 *    <jc>// Serialize using JsonSerializer.</jc>
079 *    String <jv>json</jv> = Json.<jsm>from</jsm>(<jv>info</jv>);
080 *
081 *    <jc>// Or just use toString() which does the same as above.</jc>
082 *    <jv>json</jv> = <jv>info</jv>.toString();
083 * </p>
084 * <p class='bjson'>
085 *    <jc>// Output</jc>
086 *    {
087 *       <js>"type"</js>: <js>"string"</js>,
088 *       <js>"title"</js>: <js>"foo"</js>
089 *    }
090 * </p>
091 *
092 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
093 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/specification/v2/#schema-object">Swagger 2.0 Specification &gt; Schema Object</a>
094 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://swagger.io/docs/specification/2-0/data-models/">Swagger Data Models</a>
095 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://json-schema.org/">JSON Schema Specification</a>
096 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauBeanSwagger2">juneau-bean-swagger-v2</a>
097 * </ul>
098 */
099@SuppressWarnings({
100   "java:S115", // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention
101   "java:S116" // Field names intentionally match JSON property names
102})
103public class SchemaInfo extends SwaggerElement {
104
105   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
106   private static final String ARG_key = "key";
107   private static final String ARG_property = "property";
108   private static final String ARG_value = "value";
109
110   // Property name constants
111   private static final String PROP_additionalProperties = "additionalProperties";
112   private static final String PROP_allOf = "allOf";
113   private static final String PROP_default = "default";
114   private static final String PROP_description = "description";
115   private static final String PROP_discriminator = "discriminator";
116   private static final String PROP_enum = "enum";
117   private static final String PROP_example = "example";
118   private static final String PROP_exclusiveMaximum = "exclusiveMaximum";
119   private static final String PROP_exclusiveMinimum = "exclusiveMinimum";
120   private static final String PROP_externalDocs = "externalDocs";
121   private static final String PROP_format = "format";
122   private static final String PROP_items = "items";
123   private static final String PROP_maxItems = "maxItems";
124   private static final String PROP_maxLength = "maxLength";
125   private static final String PROP_maxProperties = "maxProperties";
126   private static final String PROP_maximum = "maximum";
127   private static final String PROP_minItems = "minItems";
128   private static final String PROP_minLength = "minLength";
129   private static final String PROP_minProperties = "minProperties";
130   private static final String PROP_minimum = "minimum";
131   private static final String PROP_multipleOf = "multipleOf";
132   private static final String PROP_pattern = "pattern";
133   private static final String PROP_properties = "properties";
134   private static final String PROP_readOnly = "readOnly";
135   private static final String PROP_required = "required";
136   private static final String PROP_requiredProperties = "requiredProperties";
137   private static final String PROP_title = "title";
138   private static final String PROP_type = "type";
139   private static final String PROP_uniqueItems = "uniqueItems";
140   private static final String PROP_xml = "xml";
141   private static final String PROP_ref = "$ref";
142
143   private String format;
144   private String title;
145   private String description;
146   private String pattern;
147   private String type;
148   private String discriminator;
149   private String ref;
150   private Number multipleOf;
151   private Number maximum;
152   private Number minimum;
153   private Integer maxLength;
154   private Integer minLength;
155   private Integer maxItems;
156   private Integer minItems;
157   private Integer maxProperties;
158   private Integer minProperties;
159   private Boolean exclusiveMaximum;
160   private Boolean exclusiveMinimum;
161   private Boolean uniqueItems;
162   private Boolean readOnly;
163   private Boolean required;
164   private Object default_;
165   private Object example;
166   private Items items;
167   private Xml xml;
168   private ExternalDocumentation externalDocs;
169   private Set<Object> enum_ = new LinkedHashSet<>();
170   private Set<SchemaInfo> allOf = new LinkedHashSet<>();
171   private Set<String> requiredProperties = new LinkedHashSet<>();
172   private Map<String,SchemaInfo> properties = map();
173   private SchemaInfo additionalProperties;
174
175   /**
176    * Default constructor.
177    */
178   public SchemaInfo() {}
179
180   /**
181    * Copy constructor.
182    *
183    * @param copyFrom The object to copy.
184    */
185   public SchemaInfo(SchemaInfo copyFrom) {
186      super(copyFrom);
187
188      this.additionalProperties = copyFrom.additionalProperties == null ? null : copyFrom.additionalProperties.copy();
189      this.allOf.addAll(copyOf(copyFrom.allOf, SchemaInfo::copy));
190      this.default_ = copyFrom.default_;
191      this.description = copyFrom.description;
192      this.discriminator = copyFrom.discriminator;
193      this.enum_.addAll(copyOf(copyFrom.enum_));
194      this.example = copyFrom.example;
195      this.exclusiveMaximum = copyFrom.exclusiveMaximum;
196      this.exclusiveMinimum = copyFrom.exclusiveMinimum;
197      this.externalDocs = copyFrom.externalDocs == null ? null : copyFrom.externalDocs.copy();
198      this.format = copyFrom.format;
199      this.items = copyFrom.items == null ? null : copyFrom.items.copy();
200      this.maximum = copyFrom.maximum;
201      this.maxItems = copyFrom.maxItems;
202      this.maxLength = copyFrom.maxLength;
203      this.maxProperties = copyFrom.maxProperties;
204      this.minimum = copyFrom.minimum;
205      this.minItems = copyFrom.minItems;
206      this.minLength = copyFrom.minLength;
207      this.minProperties = copyFrom.minProperties;
208      this.multipleOf = copyFrom.multipleOf;
209      this.pattern = copyFrom.pattern;
210      this.readOnly = copyFrom.readOnly;
211      this.ref = copyFrom.ref;
212      this.required = copyFrom.required;
213      this.requiredProperties.addAll(copyOf(copyFrom.requiredProperties));
214      this.title = copyFrom.title;
215      this.type = copyFrom.type;
216      this.uniqueItems = copyFrom.uniqueItems;
217      this.xml = copyFrom.xml == null ? null : copyFrom.xml.copy();
218      properties.putAll(copyOf(copyFrom.properties, SchemaInfo::copy));
219   }
220
221   /**
222    * Bean property fluent setter:  <property>allOf</property>.
223    *
224    * <p>
225    * Inline or referenced schema MUST be of a Schema Object and not a standard JSON Schema.
226    *
227    * @param values
228    *    The values to add to this property.
229    *    <br>Ignored if <jk>null</jk>.
230    * @return This object.
231    */
232   public SchemaInfo addAllOf(Collection<SchemaInfo> values) {
233      if (nn(values))
234         for (var v : values)
235            if (nn(v))
236               allOf.add(v);
237      return this;
238   }
239
240   /**
241    * Bean property appender:  <property>allOf</property>.
242    *
243    * @param values
244    *    The values to add to this property.
245    *    <br>Ignored if <jk>null</jk>.
246    * @return This object.
247    */
248   public SchemaInfo addAllOf(SchemaInfo...values) {
249      if (nn(values))
250         for (var v : values)
251            if (nn(v))
252               allOf.add(v);
253      return this;
254   }
255
256   /**
257    * Bean property fluent setter:  <property>enum</property>.
258    *
259    * <p>
260    * An enumeration of possible values.
261    *
262    * @param values
263    *    The values to add to this property.
264    *    <br>Ignored if <jk>null</jk>.
265    * @return This object.
266    */
267   public SchemaInfo addEnum(Collection<Object> values) {
268      if (nn(values))
269         enum_.addAll(values);
270      return this;
271   }
272
273   /**
274    * Bean property appender:  <property>enum</property>.
275    *
276    * @param value
277    *    The values to add to this property.
278    *    <br>Ignored if <jk>null</jk>.
279    * @return This object.
280    */
281   public SchemaInfo addEnum(Object...value) {
282      if (nn(value))
283         for (var v : value)
284            if (nn(v))
285               enum_.add(v);
286      return this;
287   }
288
289   /**
290    * Bean property appender:  <property>properties</property>.
291    *
292    * @param key The property key.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
293    * @param value The property value.  Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
294    * @return This object.
295    */
296   public SchemaInfo addProperty(String key, SchemaInfo value) {
297      assertArgNotNull(ARG_key, key);
298      assertArgNotNull(ARG_value, value);
299      properties.put(key, value);
300      return this;
301   }
302
303   /**
304    * Bean property fluent setter:  <property>requiredProperties</property>.
305    *
306    * <p>
307    * Takes an array of strings that define the required properties.
308    *
309    * @param values
310    *    The values to add to this property.
311    *    <br>Ignored if <jk>null</jk>.
312    * @return This object.
313    */
314   public SchemaInfo addRequiredProperties(Collection<String> values) {
315      if (nn(values))
316         requiredProperties.addAll(values);
317      return this;
318   }
319
320   /**
321    * Bean property appender:  <property>requiredProperties</property>.
322    *
323    * <p>
324    * The list of required properties.
325    *
326    * @param value
327    *    The values to add to this property.
328    *    <br>Ignored if <jk>null</jk>.
329    * @return This object.
330    */
331   public SchemaInfo addRequiredProperties(String...value) {
332      if (nn(value))
333         for (var v : value)
334            if (nn(v))
335               requiredProperties.add(v);
336      return this;
337   }
338
339   /**
340    * Make a deep copy of this object.
341    *
342    * @return A deep copy of this object.
343    */
344   public SchemaInfo copy() {
345      return new SchemaInfo(this);
346   }
347
348   @Override /* Overridden from SwaggerElement */
349   @SuppressWarnings({
350      "java:S1479" // Switch statement has 32 cases, exceeding recommended limit of 30 - necessary for bean property mapping
351   })
352   public <T> T get(String property, Class<T> type) {
353      assertArgNotNull(ARG_property, property);
354      return switch (property) {
355         case PROP_additionalProperties -> toType(getAdditionalProperties(), type);
356         case PROP_allOf -> toType(getAllOf(), type);
357         case PROP_default -> toType(getDefault(), type);
358         case PROP_description -> toType(getDescription(), type);
359         case PROP_discriminator -> toType(getDiscriminator(), type);
360         case PROP_enum -> toType(getEnum(), type);
361         case PROP_example -> toType(getExample(), type);
362         case PROP_exclusiveMaximum -> toType(getExclusiveMaximum(), type);
363         case PROP_exclusiveMinimum -> toType(getExclusiveMinimum(), type);
364         case PROP_externalDocs -> toType(getExternalDocs(), type);
365         case PROP_format -> toType(getFormat(), type);
366         case PROP_items -> toType(getItems(), type);
367         case PROP_maximum -> toType(getMaximum(), type);
368         case PROP_maxItems -> toType(getMaxItems(), type);
369         case PROP_maxLength -> toType(getMaxLength(), type);
370         case PROP_maxProperties -> toType(getMaxProperties(), type);
371         case PROP_minimum -> toType(getMinimum(), type);
372         case PROP_minItems -> toType(getMinItems(), type);
373         case PROP_minLength -> toType(getMinLength(), type);
374         case PROP_minProperties -> toType(getMinProperties(), type);
375         case PROP_multipleOf -> toType(getMultipleOf(), type);
376         case PROP_pattern -> toType(getPattern(), type);
377         case PROP_properties -> toType(getProperties(), type);
378         case PROP_readOnly -> toType(getReadOnly(), type);
379         case PROP_ref -> toType(getRef(), type);
380         case PROP_required -> toType(getRequired(), type);
381         case PROP_requiredProperties -> toType(getRequiredProperties(), type);
382         case PROP_title -> toType(getTitle(), type);
383         case PROP_type -> toType(getType(), type);
384         case PROP_uniqueItems -> toType(getUniqueItems(), type);
385         case PROP_xml -> toType(getXml(), type);
386         default -> super.get(property, type);
387      };
388   }
389
390   /**
391    * Bean property getter:  <property>additionalProperties</property>.
392    *
393    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
394    */
395   public SchemaInfo getAdditionalProperties() { return additionalProperties; }
396
397   /**
398    * Bean property getter:  <property>allOf</property>.
399    *
400    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
401    */
402   public Set<SchemaInfo> getAllOf() { return nie(allOf); }
403
404   /**
405    * Bean property getter:  <property>default</property>.
406    *
407    * <p>
408    * Unlike JSON Schema, the value MUST conform to the defined type for the Schema Object.
409    *
410    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
411    */
412   public Object getDefault() { return default_; }
413
414   /**
415    * Bean property getter:  <property>description</property>.
416    *
417    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
418    */
419   public String getDescription() { return description; }
420
421   /**
422    * Bean property getter:  <property>discriminator</property>.
423    *
424    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
425    */
426   public String getDiscriminator() { return discriminator; }
427
428   /**
429    * Bean property getter:  <property>enum</property>.
430    *
431    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
432    */
433   public Set<Object> getEnum() { return nie(enum_); }
434
435   /**
436    * Bean property getter:  <property>example</property>.
437    *
438    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
439    */
440   public Object getExample() { return example; }
441
442   /**
443    * Bean property getter:  <property>exclusiveMaximum</property>.
444    *
445    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
446    */
447   public Boolean getExclusiveMaximum() { return exclusiveMaximum; }
448
449   /**
450    * Bean property getter:  <property>exclusiveMinimum</property>.
451    *
452    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
453    */
454   public Boolean getExclusiveMinimum() { return exclusiveMinimum; }
455
456   /**
457    * Bean property getter:  <property>externalDocs</property>.
458    *
459    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
460    */
461   public ExternalDocumentation getExternalDocs() { return externalDocs; }
462
463   /**
464    * Bean property getter:  <property>format</property>.
465    *
466    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
467    */
468   public String getFormat() { return format; }
469
470   /**
471    * Bean property getter:  <property>items</property>.
472    *
473    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
474    */
475   public Items getItems() { return items; }
476
477   /**
478    * Bean property getter:  <property>maximum</property>.
479    *
480    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
481    */
482   public Number getMaximum() { return maximum; }
483
484   /**
485    * Bean property getter:  <property>maxItems</property>.
486    *
487    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
488    */
489   public Integer getMaxItems() { return maxItems; }
490
491   /**
492    * Bean property getter:  <property>maxLength</property>.
493    *
494    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
495    */
496   public Integer getMaxLength() { return maxLength; }
497
498   /**
499    * Bean property getter:  <property>maxProperties</property>.
500    *
501    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
502    */
503   public Integer getMaxProperties() { return maxProperties; }
504
505   /**
506    * Bean property getter:  <property>minimum</property>.
507    *
508    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
509    */
510   public Number getMinimum() { return minimum; }
511
512   /**
513    * Bean property getter:  <property>minItems</property>.
514    *
515    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
516    */
517   public Integer getMinItems() { return minItems; }
518
519   /**
520    * Bean property getter:  <property>minLength</property>.
521    *
522    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
523    */
524   public Integer getMinLength() { return minLength; }
525
526   /**
527    * Bean property getter:  <property>minProperties</property>.
528    *
529    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
530    */
531   public Integer getMinProperties() { return minProperties; }
532
533   /**
534    * Bean property getter:  <property>multipleOf</property>.
535    *
536    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
537    */
538   public Number getMultipleOf() { return multipleOf; }
539
540   /**
541    * Bean property getter:  <property>pattern</property>.
542    *
543    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
544    */
545   public String getPattern() { return pattern; }
546
547   /**
548    * Bean property getter:  <property>properties</property>.
549    *
550    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
551    */
552   public Map<String,SchemaInfo> getProperties() { return nie(properties); }
553
554   /**
555    * Bean property getter:  <property>readOnly</property>.
556    *
557    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
558    */
559   public Boolean getReadOnly() { return readOnly; }
560
561   /**
562    * Bean property getter:  <property>$ref</property>.
563    *
564    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
565    */
566   @BeanProp("$ref")
567   public String getRef() { return ref; }
568
569   /**
570    * Bean property getter:  <property>required</property>.
571    *
572    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
573    */
574   public Boolean getRequired() { return required; }
575
576   /**
577    * Bean property getter:  <property>requiredProperties</property>.
578    *
579    * <p>
580    * The list of required properties.
581    *
582    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
583    */
584   public Set<String> getRequiredProperties() { return nie(requiredProperties); }
585
586   /**
587    * Bean property getter:  <property>title</property>.
588    *
589    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
590    */
591   public String getTitle() { return title; }
592
593   /**
594    * Bean property getter:  <property>type</property>.
595    *
596    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
597    */
598   public String getType() { return type; }
599
600   /**
601    * Bean property getter:  <property>uniqueItems</property>.
602    *
603    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
604    */
605   public Boolean getUniqueItems() { return uniqueItems; }
606
607   /**
608    * Bean property getter:  <property>xml</property>.
609    *
610    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
611    */
612   public Xml getXml() { return xml; }
613
614   @Override /* Overridden from SwaggerElement */
615   public Set<String> keySet() {
616      // @formatter:off
617      var s = stb(String.class)
618         .addIf(nn(ref), PROP_ref)
619         .addIf(nn(additionalProperties), PROP_additionalProperties)
620         .addIf(ine(allOf), PROP_allOf)
621         .addIf(nn(default_), PROP_default)
622         .addIf(nn(description), PROP_description)
623         .addIf(nn(discriminator), PROP_discriminator)
624         .addIf(ine(enum_), PROP_enum)
625         .addIf(nn(example), PROP_example)
626         .addIf(nn(exclusiveMaximum), PROP_exclusiveMaximum)
627         .addIf(nn(exclusiveMinimum), PROP_exclusiveMinimum)
628         .addIf(nn(externalDocs), PROP_externalDocs)
629         .addIf(nn(format), PROP_format)
630         .addIf(nn(items), PROP_items)
631         .addIf(nn(maxItems), PROP_maxItems)
632         .addIf(nn(maxLength), PROP_maxLength)
633         .addIf(nn(maxProperties), PROP_maxProperties)
634         .addIf(nn(maximum), PROP_maximum)
635         .addIf(nn(minItems), PROP_minItems)
636         .addIf(nn(minLength), PROP_minLength)
637         .addIf(nn(minProperties), PROP_minProperties)
638         .addIf(nn(minimum), PROP_minimum)
639         .addIf(nn(multipleOf), PROP_multipleOf)
640         .addIf(nn(pattern), PROP_pattern)
641         .addIf(ine(properties), PROP_properties)
642         .addIf(nn(readOnly), PROP_readOnly)
643         .addIf(nn(required), PROP_required)
644         .addIf(ine(requiredProperties), PROP_requiredProperties)
645         .addIf(nn(title), PROP_title)
646         .addIf(nn(type), PROP_type)
647         .addIf(nn(uniqueItems), PROP_uniqueItems)
648         .addIf(nn(xml), PROP_xml)
649         .build();
650      // @formatter:on
651      return new MultiSet<>(s, super.keySet());
652   }
653
654   /**
655    * Resolves any <js>"$ref"</js> attributes in this element.
656    *
657    * @param swagger The swagger document containing the definitions.
658    * @param refStack Keeps track of previously-visited references so that we don't cause recursive loops.
659    * @param maxDepth
660    *    The maximum depth to resolve references.
661    *    <br>After that level is reached, <c>$ref</c> references will be left alone.
662    *    <br>Useful if you have very complex models and you don't want your swagger page to be overly-complex.
663    * @return
664    *    This object with references resolved.
665    *    <br>May or may not be the same object.
666    */
667   public SchemaInfo resolveRefs(Swagger swagger, Deque<String> refStack, int maxDepth) {
668
669      if (nn(ref)) {
670         if (refStack.contains(ref) || refStack.size() >= maxDepth)
671            return this;
672         refStack.addLast(ref);
673         var r = swagger.findRef(ref, SchemaInfo.class).resolveRefs(swagger, refStack, maxDepth);
674         refStack.removeLast();
675         return r;
676      }
677
678      if (nn(items))
679         items = items.resolveRefs(swagger, refStack, maxDepth);
680
681      properties.entrySet().forEach(x -> x.setValue(x.getValue().resolveRefs(swagger, refStack, maxDepth)));
682
683      if (nn(additionalProperties))
684         additionalProperties = additionalProperties.resolveRefs(swagger, refStack, maxDepth);
685
686      this.example = null;
687
688      return this;
689   }
690
691   @Override /* Overridden from SwaggerElement */
692   @SuppressWarnings({
693      "java:S1479" // Switch statement has 32 cases, exceeding recommended limit of 30 - necessary for bean property mapping
694   })
695   public SchemaInfo set(String property, Object value) {
696      assertArgNotNull(ARG_property, property);
697      return switch (property) {
698         case PROP_additionalProperties -> setAdditionalProperties(toType(value, SchemaInfo.class));
699         case PROP_allOf -> setAllOf(toSetBuilder(value, SchemaInfo.class).sparse().build());
700         case PROP_default -> setDefault(value);
701         case PROP_description -> setDescription(s(value));
702         case PROP_discriminator -> setDiscriminator(s(value));
703         case PROP_enum -> setEnum(value);
704         case PROP_example -> setExample(value);
705         case PROP_exclusiveMaximum -> setExclusiveMaximum(toBoolean(value));
706         case PROP_exclusiveMinimum -> setExclusiveMinimum(toBoolean(value));
707         case PROP_externalDocs -> setExternalDocs(toType(value, ExternalDocumentation.class));
708         case PROP_format -> setFormat(s(value));
709         case PROP_items -> setItems(toType(value, Items.class));
710         case PROP_maximum -> setMaximum(toNumber(value));
711         case PROP_maxItems -> setMaxItems(toInteger(value));
712         case PROP_maxLength -> setMaxLength(toInteger(value));
713         case PROP_maxProperties -> setMaxProperties(toInteger(value));
714         case PROP_minimum -> setMinimum(toNumber(value));
715         case PROP_minItems -> setMinItems(toInteger(value));
716         case PROP_minLength -> setMinLength(toInteger(value));
717         case PROP_minProperties -> setMinProperties(toInteger(value));
718         case PROP_multipleOf -> setMultipleOf(toNumber(value));
719         case PROP_pattern -> setPattern(s(value));
720         case PROP_properties -> setProperties(toMapBuilder(value, String.class, SchemaInfo.class).sparse().build());
721         case PROP_readOnly -> setReadOnly(toBoolean(value));
722         case PROP_ref -> setRef(s(value));
723         case PROP_required -> setRequired(toBoolean(value));
724         case PROP_requiredProperties -> setRequiredProperties(lb(String.class).addAny(value).sparse().build());
725         case PROP_title -> setTitle(s(value));
726         case PROP_type -> setType(s(value));
727         case PROP_uniqueItems -> setUniqueItems(toBoolean(value));
728         case PROP_xml -> setXml(toType(value, Xml.class));
729         default -> {
730            super.set(property, value);
731            yield this;
732         }
733      };
734   }
735
736   /**
737    * Bean property setter:  <property>additionalProperties</property>.
738    *
739    * @param value
740    *    The new value for this property.
741    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
742    * @return This object.
743    */
744   public SchemaInfo setAdditionalProperties(SchemaInfo value) {
745      additionalProperties = value;
746      return this;
747   }
748
749   /**
750    * Bean property setter:  <property>allOf</property>.
751    *
752    * @param value
753    *    The new value for this property.
754    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
755    * @return This object.
756    */
757   public SchemaInfo setAllOf(Collection<SchemaInfo> value) {
758      allOf.clear();
759      if (nn(value))
760         allOf.addAll(value);
761      return this;
762   }
763
764   /**
765    * Bean property fluent setter:  <property>allOf</property>.
766    *
767    * @param value
768    *    The new value for this property.
769    *    <br>Strings can contains JSON arrays.
770    *    <br>Valid types:
771    * @return This object.
772    */
773   public SchemaInfo setAllOf(SchemaInfo...value) {
774      setAllOf(stb(SchemaInfo.class).sparse().addAny((Object[])value).build());
775      return this;
776   }
777
778   /**
779    * Bean property setter:  <property>default</property>.
780    *
781    * <p>
782    * Unlike JSON Schema, the value MUST conform to the defined type for the Schema Object.
783    *
784    * @param value
785    *    The new value for this property.
786    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
787    * @return This object.
788    */
789   public SchemaInfo setDefault(Object value) {
790      default_ = value;
791      return this;
792   }
793
794   /**
795    * Bean property setter:  <property>description</property>.
796    *
797    * @param value
798    *    The new value for this property.
799    *    <br><a class="doclink" href="https://help.github.com/articles/github-flavored-markdown">GFM syntax</a> can be used for rich text representation.
800    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
801    * @return This object.
802    */
803   public SchemaInfo setDescription(String value) {
804      description = value;
805      return this;
806   }
807
808   /**
809    * Bean property setter:  <property>discriminator</property>.
810    *
811    * @param value
812    *    The new value for this property.
813    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
814    * @return This object.
815    */
816   public SchemaInfo setDiscriminator(String value) {
817      discriminator = value;
818      return this;
819   }
820
821   /**
822    * Bean property setter:  <property>enum</property>.
823    *
824    * @param value
825    *    The new value for this property.
826    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
827    * @return This object.
828    */
829   public SchemaInfo setEnum(Collection<Object> value) {
830      enum_.clear();
831      if (nn(value))
832         enum_.addAll(value);
833      return this;
834   }
835
836   /**
837    * Bean property fluent setter:  <property>enum</property>.
838    *
839    * @param value
840    *    The new value for this property.
841    *    <br>Strings can be JSON arrays.
842    * @return This object.
843    */
844   public SchemaInfo setEnum(Object...value) {
845      setEnum(stb(Object.class).sparse().addAny(value).build());
846      return this;
847   }
848
849   /**
850    * Bean property setter:  <property>example</property>.
851    *
852    * @param value
853    *    The new value for this property.
854    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
855    * @return This object.
856    */
857   public SchemaInfo setExample(Object value) {
858      example = value;
859      return this;
860   }
861
862   /**
863    * Bean property setter:  <property>exclusiveMaximum</property>.
864    *
865    * @param value
866    *    The new value for this property.
867    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
868    * @return This object.
869    */
870   public SchemaInfo setExclusiveMaximum(Boolean value) {
871      exclusiveMaximum = value;
872      return this;
873   }
874
875   /**
876    * Bean property setter:  <property>exclusiveMinimum</property>.
877    *
878    * @param value
879    *    The new value for this property.
880    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
881    * @return This object.
882    */
883   public SchemaInfo setExclusiveMinimum(Boolean value) {
884      exclusiveMinimum = value;
885      return this;
886   }
887
888   /**
889    * Bean property setter:  <property>externalDocs</property>.
890    *
891    * @param value
892    *    The new value for this property.
893    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
894    * @return This object.
895    */
896   public SchemaInfo setExternalDocs(ExternalDocumentation value) {
897      externalDocs = value;
898      return this;
899   }
900
901   /**
902    * Bean property setter:  <property>format</property>.
903    *
904    * @param value
905    *    The new value for this property.
906    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
907    *    <br>Formats defined by the OAS include:
908    *    <ul>
909    *       <li><js>"int32"</js>
910    *       <li><js>"int64"</js>
911    *       <li><js>"float"</js>
912    *       <li><js>"double"</js>
913    *       <li><js>"byte"</js>
914    *       <li><js>"binary"</js>
915    *       <li><js>"date"</js>
916    *       <li><js>"date-time"</js>
917    *       <li><js>"password"</js>
918    *    </ul>
919    * @return This object.
920    */
921   public SchemaInfo setFormat(String value) {
922      format = value;
923      return this;
924   }
925
926   /**
927    * Bean property setter:  <property>items</property>.
928    *
929    * @param value
930    *    The new value for this property.
931    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
932    * @return This object.
933    */
934   public SchemaInfo setItems(Items value) {
935      items = value;
936      return this;
937   }
938
939   /**
940    * Bean property setter:  <property>maximum</property>.
941    *
942    * @param value
943    *    The new value for this property.
944    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
945    * @return This object.
946    */
947   public SchemaInfo setMaximum(Number value) {
948      maximum = value;
949      return this;
950   }
951
952   /**
953    * Bean property setter:  <property>maxItems</property>.
954    *
955    * @param value
956    *    The new value for this property.
957    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
958    * @return This object.
959    */
960   public SchemaInfo setMaxItems(Integer value) {
961      maxItems = value;
962      return this;
963   }
964
965   /**
966    * Bean property setter:  <property>maxLength</property>.
967    *
968    * @param value
969    *    The new value for this property.
970    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
971    * @return This object.
972    */
973   public SchemaInfo setMaxLength(Integer value) {
974      maxLength = value;
975      return this;
976   }
977
978   /**
979    * Bean property setter:  <property>maxProperties</property>.
980    *
981    * @param value
982    *    The new value for this property.
983    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
984    * @return This object.
985    */
986   public SchemaInfo setMaxProperties(Integer value) {
987      maxProperties = value;
988      return this;
989   }
990
991   /**
992    * Bean property setter:  <property>minimum</property>.
993    *
994    * @param value
995    *    The new value for this property.
996    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
997    * @return This object.
998    */
999   public SchemaInfo setMinimum(Number value) {
1000      minimum = value;
1001      return this;
1002   }
1003
1004   /**
1005    * Bean property setter:  <property>minItems</property>.
1006    *
1007    * @param value
1008    *    The new value for this property.
1009    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1010    * @return This object.
1011    */
1012   public SchemaInfo setMinItems(Integer value) {
1013      minItems = value;
1014      return this;
1015   }
1016
1017   /**
1018    * Bean property setter:  <property>minLength</property>.
1019    *
1020    * @param value
1021    *    The new value for this property.
1022    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1023    * @return This object.
1024    */
1025   public SchemaInfo setMinLength(Integer value) {
1026      minLength = value;
1027      return this;
1028   }
1029
1030   /**
1031    * Bean property setter:  <property>minProperties</property>.
1032    *
1033    * @param value
1034    *    The new value for this property.
1035    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1036    * @return This object.
1037    */
1038   public SchemaInfo setMinProperties(Integer value) {
1039      minProperties = value;
1040      return this;
1041   }
1042
1043   /**
1044    * Bean property setter:  <property>multipleOf</property>.
1045    *
1046    * @param value
1047    *    The new value for this property.
1048    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1049    * @return This object.
1050    */
1051   public SchemaInfo setMultipleOf(Number value) {
1052      multipleOf = value;
1053      return this;
1054   }
1055
1056   /**
1057    * Bean property setter:  <property>pattern</property>.
1058    *
1059    * @param value
1060    *    The new value for this property.
1061    *    <br>This string SHOULD be a valid regular expression.
1062    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1063    * @return This object.
1064    */
1065   public SchemaInfo setPattern(String value) {
1066      pattern = value;
1067      return this;
1068   }
1069
1070   /**
1071    * Bean property setter:  <property>properties</property>.
1072    *
1073    * @param value
1074    *    The new value for this property.
1075    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1076    * @return This object.
1077    */
1078   public SchemaInfo setProperties(Map<String,SchemaInfo> value) {
1079      properties.clear();
1080      if (nn(value))
1081         properties.putAll(value);
1082      return this;
1083   }
1084
1085   /**
1086    * Bean property setter:  <property>readOnly</property>.
1087    *
1088    * @param value
1089    *    The new value for this property.
1090    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1091    * @return This object.
1092    */
1093   public SchemaInfo setReadOnly(Boolean value) {
1094      readOnly = value;
1095      return this;
1096   }
1097
1098   /**
1099    * Bean property setter:  <property>$ref</property>.
1100    *
1101    * @param value
1102    *    The new value for this property.
1103    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1104    * @return This object.
1105    */
1106   @BeanProp("$ref")
1107   public SchemaInfo setRef(String value) {
1108      ref = value;
1109      return this;
1110   }
1111
1112   /**
1113    * Bean property setter:  <property>required</property>.
1114    *
1115    * @param value
1116    *    The new value for this property.
1117    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1118    * @return This object.
1119    */
1120   public SchemaInfo setRequired(Boolean value) {
1121      required = value;
1122      return this;
1123   }
1124
1125   /**
1126    * Bean property setter:  <property>requiredProperties</property>.
1127    *
1128    * <p>
1129    * The list of required properties.
1130    *
1131    * @param value
1132    *    The new value for this property.
1133    *    <br>Valid values:
1134    *    <ul>
1135    *       <li><js>"http"</js>
1136    *       <li><js>"https"</js>
1137    *       <li><js>"ws"</js>
1138    *       <li><js>"wss"</js>
1139    *    </ul>
1140    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1141    * @return This object.
1142    */
1143   public SchemaInfo setRequiredProperties(Collection<String> value) {
1144      requiredProperties.clear();
1145      if (nn(value))
1146         requiredProperties.addAll(value);
1147      return this;
1148   }
1149
1150   /**
1151    * Bean property fluent setter:  <property>requiredProperties</property>.
1152    *
1153    * @param value
1154    *    The new value for this property.
1155    * @return This object.
1156    */
1157   public SchemaInfo setRequiredProperties(String...value) {
1158      setRequiredProperties(stb(String.class).sparse().addAny((Object[])value).build());
1159      return this;
1160   }
1161
1162   /**
1163    * Bean property setter:  <property>title</property>.
1164    *
1165    * @param value
1166    *    The new value for this property.
1167    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1168    * @return This object.
1169    */
1170   public SchemaInfo setTitle(String value) {
1171      title = value;
1172      return this;
1173   }
1174
1175   /**
1176    * Bean property setter:  <property>type</property>.
1177    *
1178    * @param value
1179    *    The new value for this property.
1180    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1181    *    <br>Possible values include:
1182    *    <ul>
1183    *       <li><js>"object"</js>
1184    *       <li><js>"string"</js>
1185    *       <li><js>"number"</js>
1186    *       <li><js>"integer"</js>
1187    *       <li><js>"boolean"</js>
1188    *       <li><js>"array"</js>
1189    *       <li><js>"file"</js>
1190    *    </ul>
1191    * @return This object.
1192    */
1193   public SchemaInfo setType(String value) {
1194      type = value;
1195      return this;
1196   }
1197
1198   /**
1199    * Bean property setter:  <property>uniqueItems</property>.
1200    *
1201    * @param value
1202    *    The new value for this property.
1203    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1204    * @return This object.
1205    */
1206   public SchemaInfo setUniqueItems(Boolean value) {
1207      uniqueItems = value;
1208      return this;
1209   }
1210
1211   /**
1212    * Bean property setter:  <property>xml</property>.
1213    *
1214    * @param value
1215    *    The new value for this property.
1216    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset the property.
1217    * @return This object.
1218    */
1219   public SchemaInfo setXml(Xml value) {
1220      xml = value;
1221      return this;
1222   }
1223
1224   /**
1225    * Sets strict mode on this bean.
1226    *
1227    * @return This object.
1228    */
1229   @Override
1230   public SchemaInfo strict() {
1231      super.strict();
1232      return this;
1233   }
1234
1235   /**
1236    * Sets strict mode on this bean.
1237    *
1238    * @param value
1239    *    The new value for this property.
1240    *    <br>Non-boolean values will be converted to boolean using <code>Boolean.<jsm>valueOf</jsm>(value.toString())</code>.
1241    *    <br>Can be <jk>null</jk> (interpreted as <jk>false</jk>).
1242    * @return This object.
1243    */
1244   @Override
1245   public SchemaInfo strict(Object value) {
1246      super.strict(value);
1247      return this;
1248   }
1249}
